title: Integrate CloudWatch procedure log streaming
description:
Merge Derek's execute-tactus branch update into develop.

Behavior intent:
- Procedure runs stream lifecycle/tool/cost events to CloudWatch in real time.
- Procedure runs write full LLM prompt-context JSON to a separate CloudWatch stream.
- Procedure metadata records log group and stream prefix so dashboard integrations can locate logs later.
- IAM permissions support consoleRunWorker writes and authenticated dashboard reads.

Definition of Done:
- PR from feature/plx-07dc0d-execute-tactus-mcp-tool to develop is created.
- CI passes or failures are fixed.
- PR is merged into develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fetched Derek's new execute-tactus branch commit 84686085. Delta against develop is CloudWatch procedure log streaming across Amplify IAM/backend, dashboard log client utility, cloudwatch_logger.py, and procedure_executor.py.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Local verification: dashboard typecheck passes after fixing the CloudWatch log client to avoid static import of untracked amplify_outputs.json; py_compile passes for cloudwatch_logger.py and procedure_executor.py. Also refreshed dashboard package-lock for the new direct CloudWatch Logs SDK dependency.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Merged PR #265 into develop and verified develop CI run 25236213294 passed.
